calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Feb-07-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Timur Berberoglu appeared by telephone for Vicie Fairley (Executor).

The Court noted that no one else is present and that no objections have been filed. The Court granted the First and Final Report; Petition for Final Distribution (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Chan. Not reported.
